cases.title: Find a task-handle admission race
cases.prompt: Review this small Rust crate for a lifecycle correctness bug. Explain a concrete interleaving, cite the affected fields/method, and run focused verification without modifying files.

cases.title: Find unverified work accepted as success
cases.prompt: Review the outcome-to-acceptance logic. Identify any false-success path, cite the exact outcome involved, and run focused verification without modifying files.

cases.title: Avoid inventing a bug in correct acceptance logic
cases.prompt: Review the outcome-to-acceptance logic for false-success behavior. This is a clean-control case: report concrete issues only if supported, explain the verified/submitted distinction, and run focused verification without modifying files.
